home.metaTitle: Morocco Desert Travel: The Complete Guide
home.metaDescription: Everything to plan your Sahara desert trip in Morocco: best time to go, itineraries, where to sleep and practical tips.
home.heroSubtitle: Real guides, itineraries and tips for the Sahara: from Marrakech to Merzouga and Erg Chigaga.
home.faq1q: When is the best time to visit the Moroccan desert?
home.faq1a: Spring (March-May) and autumn (September-November) are the best seasons. Temperatures are comfortable (20-30°C) and landscapes are spectacular. Avoid July and August when heat exceeds 45°C.
home.faq2q: How much does a Sahara excursion cost?
home.faq2a: A private 3-day circuit from Marrakech costs between €150-300 per person. The price includes 4×4 transport, guide, camp accommodation and half board. Luxury camps cost more but the experience is worth it.
home.faq3q: Is it safe to travel to Morocco?
home.faq3a: Yes, Morocco is one of the safest countries in North Africa. Main cities and tourist routes are very safe. We recommend respecting local customs and hiring a local guide for remote desert areas.
home.faq4q: How to book a tour or get more information?
home.faq4a: You can contact us directly by WhatsApp or email. We reply within 24 hours with availability, prices and a personalised itinerary based on your dates and preferences.
